short.en: OAuth 2.0 / OpenID Connect single sign-on for GLPI: Azure, Google, GitHub, and more; JSON field mappings and optional user registration.

long.en:
## Single Sign-On for GLPI
[![Continuous integration](https://github.com/edgardmessias/glpi-singlesignon/actions/workflows/continuous-integration.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/edgardmessias/glpi-singlesignon/actions/workflows/continuous-integration.yml) [![CodeFactor](https://www.codefactor.io/repository/github/edgardmessias/glpi-singlesignon/badge)](https://www.codefactor.io/repository/github/edgardmessias/glpi-singlesignon) [![Total Downloads](https://img.shields.io/github/downloads/edgardmessias/glpi-singlesignon/total.svg)](https://github.com/edgardmessias/glpi-singlesignon/releases) [![Current Release](https://img.shields.io/github/release/edgardmessias/glpi-singlesignon.svg)](https://github.com/edgardmessias/glpi-singlesignon/releases/latest)
Let users sign in with **Microsoft Entra ID (Azure AD)**, **Google**, **GitHub**, **Facebook**, **LinkedIn**, **Instagram**, or any **OAuth 2.0 / OIDC** server (Generic). The plugin adds **Login with …** buttons on the GLPI login page, exchanges codes for tokens, loads the user profile, and maps claims to GLPI users (with optional automatic registration).
### Features
- Preset providers (Azure, Google, GitHub, Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn) plus **Generic** for Keycloak, Okta, Auth0, etc. - Per-provider **field mappings** (JSONPath) for id, email, username, name, and avatar URL. - **Callback URL** shown in the provider form for your IdP app registration. - User photo sync, authorized domains, SSL options, and hooks for advanced integration.
### Documentation
Administrator guides (installation, identity providers, configuration, field mappings, FAQ) live in the repository:
**[https://github.com/edgardmessias/glpi-singlesignon/tree/main/docs](https://github.com/edgardmessias/glpi-singlesignon/tree/main/docs)**
Contributing, releases, and translations: **[CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/edgardmessias/glpi-singlesignon/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)**.
### Requirements
- **GLPI** 11.0.x (see plugin `setup.php` for exact min/max). - **PHP** 8.2 or newer (checked when installing the plugin).
### Installation
1. Extract the release archive so the folder is named **`singlesignon`** under `<GLPI_ROOT>/plugins/`. 2. In GLPI: **Setup → Plugins** — install and enable **Single Sign-On**. 3. **Setup → General**: set **URL of the application** to your public GLPI URL (needed for a correct OAuth callback). 4. **Setup → Single Sign-On**: add a provider and register the **Callback URL** with your identity provider.
Latest release package (example): `https://github.com/edgardmessias/glpi-singlesignon/releases/latest/download/singlesignon.tar.bz2`
### IdP documentation (examples)
- [Microsoft Entra / Azure AD](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/entra/identity-platform/quickstart-register-app) - [Google OAuth](https://developers.google.com/identity/protocols/oauth2) - [GitHub OAuth apps](https://docs.github.com/en/apps/oauth-apps/building-oauth-apps/creating-an-oauth-app) - [Facebook Login](https://developers.facebook.com/docs/facebook-login) - [LinkedIn OAuth 2.0](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/linkedin/shared/authentication/authentication)
